title: How to join a list of cells into one comma-separated string
task: Combine a column of values into a single cell separated by commas, skipping blanks.

libreoffice.note: Supported; LibreOffice wants TRUE() as a function.

explanation: TEXTJOIN(delimiter, ignore_empty, range) glues the values together with your chosen delimiter. The second argument TRUE skips empty cells so you never get doubled-up separators.
